words.definition_vi: Vấn đề, chủ đề tranh cãi; hoặc: phát hành, phát sóng (tài liệu, tiền tệ)
words.definition_en: A topic of discussion or concern; or the act of distributing or publishing something officially
words.example_sentence: The government decided to issue new banknotes to address the currency shortage affecting the economy.

words.definition_vi: Giải quyết, xử lý (vấn đề); hoặc: nói chuyện với ai, phát biểu trước đám đông
words.definition_en: To deal with or discuss a problem; or to speak to an audience formally
words.example_sentence: The CEO will address the shareholders' concerns about declining profits in tomorrow's meeting.

words.definition_vi: Tính tiền, yêu cầu thanh toán; hoặc: tấn công, lao vào; hoặc: giao trách nhiệm
words.definition_en: To ask for payment; to rush forward; or to assign responsibility to someone
words.example_sentence: The hotel charged us an extra fee for late checkout, though we were not charged for breakfast.

words.definition_vi: Tiến hành, thực hiện (cuộc điều tra, thí nghiệm); hoặc: chỉ huy (dàn nhạc)
words.definition_en: To carry out or manage an activity; or to direct musicians or an orchestra
words.example_sentence: Scientists will conduct a comprehensive study to examine how climate change affects marine ecosystems.

words.definition_vi: Chịu đựng, chịu (trách nhiệm, chi phí); hoặc: mang, vác; hoặc: sinh ra
words.definition_en: To endure or accept responsibility; to carry; or to give birth to
words.example_sentence: The company must bear the costs of environmental damage caused by its manufacturing processes.

words.definition_vi: Chạy; hoặc: điều hành, quản lý; hoặc: kéo dài, tiếp tục
words.definition_en: To move quickly on foot; to manage or operate; or to continue for a period
words.example_sentence: The factory runs three shifts daily to meet production targets, and this schedule will run until next quarter.

words.definition_vi: Đánh, tấn công; hoặc: đình công; hoặc: tìm thấy, phát hiện
words.definition_en: To hit or attack; to stop work as a protest; or to discover something valuable
words.example_sentence: Workers decided to strike over wage disputes, while geologists struck oil in the northern region.

words.definition_vi: Ngân hàng (tài chính); hoặc: bờ sông, bờ biển; hoặc: kho dự trữ
words.definition_en: A financial institution; the edge of a river or sea; or a reserve supply
words.example_sentence: The bank approved the loan application, and the project will be built along the river bank.

words.definition_vi: Sáng, có ánh sáng; hoặc: nhẹ (trọng lượng); hoặc: nhẹ nhàng, không nặng nề
words.definition_en: Bright or illuminated; not heavy; or not serious or intense
words.example_sentence: The light traffic on the highway made the journey quick, and the light rain did not delay the outdoor event.

words.definition_vi: Trình bày, giới thiệu; hoặc: tặng, trao; hoặc: xuất hiện
words.definition_en: To show or introduce something; to give as a gift; or to appear or exist
words.example_sentence: The researcher will present her findings at the conference, and the results present a new perspective on climate science.

words.definition_vi: Đánh dấu, ghi chú; hoặc: chấm điểm; hoặc: để lại dấu vết
words.definition_en: To make a sign or note on something; to grade or assess; or to leave a trace
words.example_sentence: Teachers will mark the exam papers carefully, and the scandal marked a turning point in the company's reputation.

words.definition_vi: Đứng; hoặc: chịu đựng, chịu; hoặc: duy trì (quan điểm); hoặc: ứng cử
words.definition_en: To be in an upright position; to tolerate; to maintain a position; or to run for office
words.example_sentence: He cannot stand the noise, and he decided to stand for election despite the challenges ahead.

words.definition_vi: Phá vỡ, làm gãy; hoặc: vi phạm (luật); hoặc: ngừng, tạm dừng; hoặc: phá vỡ (kỷ lục)
words.definition_en: To damage or shatter; to violate a rule; to pause or stop; or to surpass a record
words.example_sentence: The athlete broke the world record, but the company broke its contract with the supplier.

words.definition_vi: Vẽ, phác họa; hoặc: kéo, lôi; hoặc: hút, hấp dẫn; hoặc: rút (tiền); hoặc: hòa (trong trò chơi)
words.definition_en: To create a picture; to pull or drag; to attract; to withdraw money; or to tie in a game
words.example_sentence: The artist drew inspiration from nature, while the lottery draw attracted millions of participants.

words.definition_vi: Che phủ, bao phủ; hoặc: đề cập, bao gồm; hoặc: che giấu; hoặc: đi qua (khoảng cách)
words.definition_en: To place something over; to include or discuss; to conceal; or to travel a distance
words.example_sentence: The report covers all aspects of the project, and the team covered fifty kilometers in one day.

words.definition_vi: Phù hợp, tương xứng; hoặc: so sánh, đối sánh; hoặc: trận đấu (danh từ)
words.definition_en: To be compatible or equal; to compare or pair; or a competitive game
words.example_sentence: The colors don't match the interior design, and the tennis match attracted thousands of spectators.

words.definition_vi: Tập tin, hồ sơ; hoặc: dụng cụ cạo, dũa; hoặc: hàng dài người
words.definition_en: A document or record; a tool for smoothing surfaces; or a line of people
words.example_sentence: The company filed the legal documents, and the carpenter used a file to smooth the wooden surface.

words.definition_vi: Quy mô, mức độ; hoặc: cân (dụng cụ); hoặc: vảy (cá); hoặc: thang đo
words.definition_en: The size or extent of something; a weighing device; fish covering; or a graduated range
words.example_sentence: The project operates on a large scale, and the fish's scales protect it from predators.

words.definition_vi: Vòng tròn, nhẫn; hoặc: tiếng chuông; hoặc: sân đấu (boxing)
words.definition_en: A circular band or object; the sound of a bell; or a boxing arena
words.example_sentence: She wore a diamond ring, and the bell's ring echoed through the empty hall.

words.definition_vi: Cây cối; hoặc: nhà máy, xưởng; hoặc: cài cắm (bằng chứng giả)
words.definition_en: A living organism that grows from the soil; a factory or facility; or to place something secretly
words.example_sentence: The manufacturing plant produces thousands of units daily, and the garden is full of rare plants.

words.definition_vi: Tòa án; hoặc: sân (tennis, bóng rổ); hoặc: triều đình; hoặc: tìm cách chiếu lòng
words.definition_en: A legal institution; a sports playing area; a royal residence; or to seek favor
words.example_sentence: The case was brought to court, and the tennis match took place on the grass court.

words.definition_vi: Bảng, tấm gỗ; hoặc: hội đồng, ban giám đốc; hoặc: lên tàu/máy bay; hoặc: ăn ở
words.definition_en: A flat piece of wood; a group of directors; to enter a vehicle; or to provide meals
words.example_sentence: The board of directors approved the budget, and passengers will board the flight in thirty minutes.

words.definition_vi: Công bằng, công chính; hoặc: khá, tạm được; hoặc: sáng (da); hoặc: hội chợ
words.definition_en: Just and impartial; reasonably good; light-colored; or a public event with entertainment
words.example_sentence: The judge made a fair decision, and the weather was fair enough for the outdoor fair to proceed.

questions.question_text: The government decided to _____ new regulations to _____ the growing concerns about environmental pollution.
questions.explanation: Issue = phát hành (regulations); address = giải quyết (concerns). Đáp án B sai vì đảo ngược nghĩa. C sai vì conduct không phù hợp ngữ cảnh. D sai vì charge không có nghĩa phát hành.

questions.question_text: The company was _____ a high fee for the service, but the workers decided to _____ over wage disputes.
questions.explanation: Charged = tính tiền; strike = đình công. B sai vì run không có nghĩa đình công. C sai vì conducted không phù hợp. D sai vì issued không có nghĩa tính tiền.

questions.question_text: The scientist will _____ an experiment to _____ whether the new theory is correct.
questions.explanation: Conduct = tiến hành; test = kiểm tra (từ đồng nghĩa). A sai vì bear không phù hợp. C sai vì đảo ngược. D sai vì charge không phù hợp.

questions.question_text: The company must _____ the costs of the accident, and the report will _____ all relevant details.
questions.explanation: Bear = chịu (chi phí); cover = đề cập, bao gồm. B sai vì charge không có nghĩa chịu chi phí. C sai vì run không phù hợp. D sai vì stand không phù hợp.

questions.question_text: The factory _____ three shifts daily, and this schedule will _____ until the end of the year.
questions.explanation: Run = điều hành (shifts); run = kéo dài (schedule). C cũng đúng về nghĩa nhưng A tự nhiên hơn. B sai vì stand không phù hợp.

questions.question_text: The athlete _____ the world record, while the company _____ its contract with the supplier.
questions.explanation: Break = phá vỡ (kỷ lục); break = vi phạm (hợp đồng). Cùng một từ nhưng hai nghĩa khác nhau. B sai vì marked không có nghĩa phá vỡ kỷ lục.

questions.question_text: The artist _____ inspiration from nature, while the lottery _____ attracted millions of participants.
questions.explanation: Drew = hút, hấp dẫn (inspiration); draw = rút thăm (danh từ). B đúng vì 'lottery draw' là cụm danh từ. A sai vì 'lottery draw' không phải động từ. C sai vì nghĩa không phù hợp.

questions.question_text: The report _____ all aspects of the project, and the team _____ fifty kilometers in one day.
questions.explanation: Cover = đề cập (aspects); cover = đi qua (khoảng cách). Cùng một từ, hai nghĩa khác nhau. B sai vì addressed không có nghĩa đi qua khoảng cách.

questions.question_text: The colors don't _____ the interior design, and the tennis _____ attracted thousands of spectators.
questions.explanation: Match = phù hợp (colors); match = trận đấu (danh từ). A đúng vì cùng từ, hai nghĩa khác. B sai vì 'tennis match' là cụm danh từ, không phải động từ.

questions.question_text: The company _____ the legal documents, and the carpenter used a _____ to smooth the wooden surface.
questions.explanation: Filed = nộp (documents); file = dụng cụ cạo. A đúng vì cùng từ, hai nghĩa khác. B sai vì 'tool' quá chung chung. C sai vì presented không phù hợp.

questions.question_text: The project operates on a large _____, and the fish's _____ protect it from predators.
questions.explanation: Scale = quy mô (project); scales = vảy (fish). A đúng vì cùng từ gốc, hai hình thức khác. B sai vì extent không phù hợp ngữ cảnh 'operates on a large ___'.

questions.question_text: She wore a diamond _____, and the bell's _____ echoed through the empty hall.
questions.explanation: Ring = nhẫn (danh từ); ring = tiếng chuông (danh từ). A đúng vì cùng từ, hai nghĩa khác. C sai vì 'sound' không cụ thể bằng 'ring'.
